title: Blueprint Author Site Manager
concept: A Site Manager takeover that makes the manager the main product surface, using compact card grids plus a detail drawer for launch, persistence, authoring, inspection, export, and saved-site consequences while the WordPress site remains a narrow preview.
focus: Site Manager as primary app surface
flows: select a launch route such as Gutenberg branch and see its required input in the detail drawer
save a temporary Playground in browser storage with file-copy progress and a saved slug
choose a local directory save destination with a separate resulting state
manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with visible rename and delete consequences
edit settings, reset unsaved sites, and reload stored sites from the Settings tab
browse files, edit wp-config.php, author blueprint.json, inspect database, view logs, export to GitHub, download a zip, and import a zip
filter the Blueprint gallery, inspect catalog entries, and run a selected Blueprint
featureCoverage: GitHub import with account connection note
Blueprint gallery category filters and search
featured Blueprint shortcuts represented in catalog
WordPress version, older versions, PHP, language, network, and multisite settings
destructive Apply Settings and Reset Playground
File browser with create, upload, browse, tree, and code editor
Blueprint editor with copy link, download bundle, and run
database driver, SQLite path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
